speaker: Mira
text: My vision... everything is blurring. What's happening to me?!

speaker: Solen
text: The Demon King's curse. He poisoned the timeline itself — the more you disturb his servants, the deeper the haze takes root.

speaker: Solen
text: The past was never meant to be walked by the living. His curse ensures that those who linger here lose themselves to the fog of forgotten time.

speaker: Solen
text: But do not stop. If you falter now, the haze will claim you — and Ren will be alone in a dead future.
